summary: 本周GitHub Trending共收录 32 个热门项目，新上榜 32 个，以Python项目为主（9个），主要集中在AI工具/LLM应用（13个）、其他（5个）方向，榜首iptv作为本周AI工具/LLM应用方向的明星项目登顶（2650 stars），反映出开发者对AI工具和智能体的持续旺盛需求。

top_10.title: iptv-org/iptv
top_10.content: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

top_10.title: addyosmani/agent-skills
top_10.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

top_10.title: apple/container
top_10.content: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

top_10.title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
top_10.content: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

top_10.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
top_10.content: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

top_10.title: sponsors/obra
top_10.content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

top_10.title: sponsors/freeCodeCamp
top_10.content: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.

top_10.content: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others. 推荐阅读原文了解更多细节。

top_10.title: sponsors/chatwoot
top_10.content: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬
